message: Full rewrite of chat-view.tsx: ChatHeader, VoiceOrb (120px, CSS keyframe animations), DataCard, ChatMessage, MessageThread with quick-action chips, TextInput (never disabled), LiveKitChatInner, ChatView root. Text commands always work via parseCommand/executeCommand fallback.
next_steps: Run CI: npm run typecheck && npm run build in web-client

history.message: Created /api/claude proxy endpoint to remove browser API key exposure. Removed dangerouslyAllowBrowser and VITE_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY from claudeService.ts. Replaced direct Anthropic SDK usage with fetch calls through /api/claude server proxy using existing apiFetch utility.
next_steps: Other services (claudeVoicePipeline, memoryFilterService, episodeSummaryService, lossAnalysisService) still use VITE_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY directly and should be migrated next
Add ANTHROPIC_API_KEY to Vercel env vars for production

history.message: Created notification consumer service and wired checkNotifications/dismissNotification voice tools. All 7 tests pass.
next_steps: Test with actual voice input: say Do I have any notifications

history.message: Upgraded Stripe SDK from v17.5.0 to v20.3.1. No code changes needed - all existing APIs (checkout sessions, payment links, webhook verification) are fully compatible. All Stripe-related tests pass.
next_steps: No follow-up needed - drop-in upgrade

history.message: Wrote 20 new tests: 10 for actionLogService, 10 for leadNurturingService. Verified threadContextLoader already had all 7 required tests. All 27 tests pass. Used vi.hoisted() pattern for Vitest 4 mock compatibility.
next_steps: Run full test suite to verify no regressions

history.message: Split 3 oversized skill bundles into 7 new bundles (all <= 15 tools). Created memoryAssistantCore (10), memoryAssistantAdvanced (8), emailInboxCore (14), emailApprovalQueue (8), emailSpamFilter (7/6), eventManagementCore (14), eventLeadManagement (10/9). Updated index.ts with new registrations and context configs. Added deprecation comments to old files. Created bundleSizeLimit.test.ts - all 8 tests pass. Build succeeds.
next_steps: Verify no runtime regressions with full integration test

history.message: Full verification complete. Build passes. 1431/1434 tests pass (3 pre-existing CalendarWidget locale failures). All 7 bundles under 15-tool limit. Validation loop, voice teaching, bundle registration, and migration all verified.
next_steps: Ready for PR

history.message: Task 3: Fixed draftService.ts regenerateDraft to pass client from_name and from_email to recordCorrection. Task 4: Added reinforceBehavior and decayBehavior methods to BehaviorInjectionService with confidence increment/decrement of 0.05, cap at 0.99, deactivation below 0.3.
next_steps: Wire reinforceBehavior/decayBehavior into draftLearningService correction flow
Code review all Phase 3 changes

history.message: Wired behavior injection into voice pipeline and created confidence_history migration
next_steps: Run full test suite to verify no regressions
Code review the behavior injection approach

history.message: Added deeper integration tests for recordDraftCorrection -> storeClientCorrection -> behaviorInjectionService chain. 16 total tests across 3 files, all passing. 32 existing tests confirmed no regressions.
next_steps: Wire reinforceBehavior/decayBehavior into draftLearningService correction flow

history.message: Added 5 missing handler types to VoiceToolContext.tsx, added getDailyBrief switch case to toolExecutor.ts, added missing ToolHandlers interface members (onCheckSmsStatus, onSearchOlderSms, onNavigateToAllEvents, onFilterEvents, onOpenClientPortal), created 26 integration tests for all 18 Memory Assistant tools
next_steps: Review and approve changes

history.message: Added action logging helpers and integrated into 6 voice handler hooks. Enhanced getDailyBrief with notifications, recent actions, and richer summary. All tests pass, build succeeds.
next_steps: Run full regression test
Verify voice commands trigger action logs in staging

history.message: Task 4: Added workflow persistence to Supabase with migration, persistence service, coordinator integration. Task 5: Implemented all 6 operationsAgent act() operations with real service calls, replaced helper stubs.
next_steps: Run migration 032_workflows.sql against Supabase
Set VITE_ENABLE_WORKFLOW_PERSISTENCE=true in env to enable persistence
